title: How SFI is helping a small farm improve profitability and resilience

content.text: Edward Earnshaw is a third-generation farmer in Gloucestershire.

In this video, Edward explains how Sustainable Farming Incentive (SFI) actions are helping his small family farm streamline management, cut input costs, and boost profitability while delivering environmental benefits.
The Farming Blog is where we, Defra's Farming and Countryside Team, share the latest developments in farming policy and funding opportunities in England.
You'll find videos, podcasts and blog posts explaining changes that could affect your business, as well as information on how to make the most of schemes and grants.
Whether you're looking for updates on the Sustainable Farming Incentive, Capital Grants or other farming support, the blog helps you stay informed and understand what changes mean for you.
For detailed guidance and application information, we'll always signpost you to the relevant GOV.UK pages.
Subscribe to the Farming Blog and get the latest farming news, policy updates, funding opportunities and practical guidance delivered straight to your inbox.
